arts.ttl: Manchester City vs West Ham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host West Ham in the Premier League this weekend as the champions look to rediscover their form. Pep Guardiola’s side beat Leicester City last time out to end their winless run, though it’s just two wins in 14 games for the Premier League champions. arts.ttl: City v West Ham programme: Savinho interview, 2024 in review, Corrigan tribute
arts.sum: That Foxes victory not only marked a return to form for the Blues, it was also Pep Guardiola ’s 500th game as manager. It’s another bumper issue of the matchday programme for our home clash with West Ham.

arts.ttl: Man City threatening to beat Arsenal to 18-goal striker
arts.sum: Earlier this week, it was claimed that Arsenal had surged past Liverpool into pole position for Marmoush, but now several sources, including from his native Egypt, suggest that the 25-year-old is on his way to Man City instead. The 25-year-old has netted 18 goals and provided 12 assists in just 24 appearances across all competitions so far, which has been the biggest reason behind Frankfurt's surge up the Bundesliga table this season.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Man City insiders are now saying amid claims they've agreed to sign £50m forward
arts.sum: Manchester City have denied that they have agreed terms with Eintracht Frankfurt to sign Egyptian star Omar Marmoush, TBR Football can confirm. Reports in Egypt...

arts.ttl: West Ham XI vs Man City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: West Ham make the trip to Manchester City this weekend looking for a response. Julen Lopetegui’s side saw their four-game unbeaten run ended emphatically by Premier League leaders Liverpool last time out. A humiliating home defeat saw the visitors win 5-0 at the London Stadium to pile the pressure on the Spaniard’s position. arts.ttl: Inside ex-Man City star Robinho’s Christmas at ‘prison of the famous’ with killers and ‘jail Tinder’
arts.sum: Disgraced Manchester City, Real Madrid and AC Milan star Robinho is serving a nine-year prison sentence in Sao Paulo's notorious Tremebe complex, which is home to murderers and rapists

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham join Man City in race for €20m Ligue 1 star as Postecoglou looks to fix key area
arts.sum: The backline of Tottenham has been ravaged by injuries during the first half of the 2024/25 campaign and Ange Postecoglou will look to fix this issue in January with the potential signing of Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs West Ham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City commence 2025 with a Premier League clash against West Ham United. Pep Guardiola’s side earned a much-needed three points last weekend with a 2-0 victory at Leicester City. Unlike previous weeks, every City player came away unscathed from last weekend’s action. arts.ttl: Reports: Dortmund and Leverkusen battle for Manchester City youngster
arts.sum: According to reports, Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen are both keen on Manchester City's James McAtee.

arts.ttl: Man City sent must win warning as pundits make the same West Ham prediction after Jarrod Bowen blow
arts.sum: City welcome West Ham United to the Etihad Stadium and the pundits have been making their predictions
